headline: Allegion (ALLE) Stock And The Value Question After New Access Control Launches
summary: Allegion (ALLE) has been in focus after using the Apartmentalize 2026 conference to showcase new integrated electronic access control products from Schlage, Zentra, and Gatewise, targeting multifamily and student housing security. See our latest analysis for Allegion. At a share price of $133.97, Allegion has seen short term momentum pick up, with a 7 day share price return of 4.97% and a 30 day gain of 6.62%. This comes even though the share price is down 16.74% year to date and the 1 year...
